params.note: PROVISIONAL after golden-set expansion to 78 queries (16 multi_hop) for ADR 0026 Phase 2; metrics/metrics_by_tag below are the pre-expansion v3-multi-hop 26-query run and are NOT valid for the expanded set. New metric values are intentionally not fabricated and must be regenerated by the Phase 4 GPU bake-off before this baseline is trusted for regression gating. Prior v3 note: Hybrid baseline with 26 queries (4 multi_hop). GPU re-index of codebase-indexer-mcp via bundled TEI jinaai/jina-embeddings-v2-base-code @ 768 (ADR 0025 Phase 1 closeout), RTX 4060 Ti (compute cap 8.9), TEI image 89-1.9, entrypoint override to /usr/local/bin/text-embeddings-router in docker-compose.tei.gpu.yml (bypasses upstream cuda-entrypoint.sh CUDA UMD Version parse bug on NVIDIA driver 6xx, huggingface/text-embeddings-inference#870). RERANK_ENABLED=false. Clean harness run 2026-07-07: validate_labels 43/43 found (golden alias line numbers corrected); eval_retrieval executed in harness (threshold 0 self-compare pass). tei_health + tei_embed_smoke dim=768 + tei_gpu_visible pass; nvidia-smi shows /text-embeddings-router on GPU. bench.py full index 92.41 chunks/s (187 chunks, 2.023s).

multi_hop_2hop.note: Two-hop client RRF (eval_multihop.py) on 4 multi_hop queries; hop1+hop2 fused vs single-pass multi_hop recall@10 0.333333 in metrics_by_tag.
